summary: Completed backend testing for FrameworkGuard AI with new features: Slack alerts, Redis deduplication, multi-tenant security, and incident stats endpoint. Core functionality working with 7/8 critical features passing tests.

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: Intermittent 500 errors due to database connection issues (httpx.RemoteProtocolError: Server disconnected)
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Retry mechanism - endpoint works on retry

integration_issues.issue: Claude API model access denied - key only allows Gemini models but system tries to use claude-sonnet-4-20250514
integration_issues.impact: AI analysis fails but incident reporting still works
integration_issues.error_message: AuthenticationError: key not allowed to access model

passed_tests: API key validation (401 for invalid keys)
action_item_for_main_agent: AI analysis service needs model configuration fix - either update to use Gemini models or provide Claude API access. Database connection stability could be improved but core functionality is working.
success_percentage: backend: 85% (7/8 critical tests passing, AI analysis failing but not blocking core features)
